testcase.name: protectedEndpoints_bffMeRedirectsToLogin
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-04T16:15:55.917+02:00 INFO 4247 --- [gateway] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration io.b2mash.b2b.gateway.GatewayApplication for test class io.b2mash.b2b.gateway.config.GatewaySecurityConfigTest

:: Spring Boot :: (v4.0.2)

testcase.name: publicEndpoints_actuatorHealthIsAccessible
testcase.system-out:
